creator: crest@rlwinm.de
text:
(In reply to Mateusz Piotrowski from comment #5)

The skipped 0.4.0.1 release contains just my bugfix to s6-rc-update for OpenBSD.

The 0.4.1.0 release adds support for/requires the latest releases of skalibs and s6 (for some features) and makes use of new max-death-tally and down-signal support.
